mapper.select: select * from t_menu where menu_name=#{menuName} and parent_id = #{parentId} and deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag} limit 1
select * from t_menu where parent_id = #{menuId} and deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag} and menu_type = #{menuType}
select * from t_menu where perms_identifier=#{permsIdentifier} and deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag} limit 1
